meaning: n.社团,协会,联盟,(国际)财团,[律]配偶的权利,<美>大学联盟协定
examples: The consortium is a nonprofit group affiliated with the University of Chicago.
The consortium includes some of the biggest building contractors in North America.
A consortium plans to build a natural-gas pipeline from Russia to supply eastern Germany.
Scottish Retail Consortium (SRC) footfall figures show numbers increased by 1% compared to a year ago.
The consortium was formed last autumn when Punch put the pub on the market.
